mapper.sql: id, frame_sn, model_name, manufacturer, status, max_flight_altitude, max_flight_speed, flight_duration, battery_capacity, payload_capacity, notes, ai_attributes, ai_generation_status, ai_last_error, created_at, updated_at

sql.if:
(
LOWER(frame_sn) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(model_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR (manufacturer IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(manufacturer) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))) OR (notes IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(notes) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')))
LOWER(frame_sn) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR LOWER(model_name) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR (manufacturer IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(manufacturer) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%')) OR (notes IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(notes) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%'))
)

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uav ( frame_sn, model_name, manufacturer, status, max_flight_altitude, max_flight_speed, flight_duration, battery_capacity, payload_capacity, notes, ai_attributes, ai_generation_status, ai_last_error, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{frameSn}, #{modelName}, #{manufacturer}, #{status}, #{maxFlightAltitude}, #{maxFlightSpeed}, #{flightDuration}, #{batteryCapacity}, #{payloadCapacity}, #{notes}, #{aiAttributes}, #{aiGenerationStatus}, #{aiLastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE uav SET frame_sn = #{frameSn}, model_name = #{modelName}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, status = #{status}, max_flight_altitude = #{maxFlightAltitude}, max_flight_speed = #{maxFlightSpeed}, flight_duration = #{flightDuration}, battery_capacity = #{batteryCapacity}, payload_capacity = #{payloadCapacity}, notes = #{notes}, ai_attributes = #{aiAttributes}, ai_generation_status = #{aiGenerationStatus}, ai_last_error = #{aiLastError}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
